rationale: The citing paper references Labroo and Lee (2006) only in the General Discussion as an example of a prior account of implicit regulatory-fit processing ("goal fluency"). It is used in a grouped, high-level literature mention alongside other work, not as a study the authors directly build hypotheses, design choices, measures, or analyses on. The core empirical contribution of the citing paper is developed from broader regulatory focus and compatibility literature rather than a direct extension of this specific article.
